text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-on rally, tech-led, metals surged, energy crushed.
US-Iran peace hopes and AMD's $10.25B Q1 revenue beat fueled 1.5% S&P 500 gain to 7365. Oil's 7.03% drop to $95.08 lifted industrials 2.6% via XLI. Flows favored accumulation in cyclicals amid neutral Fear & Greed 54.1.

INDICES — VIX 17.4 down vs 18.3 20d MA. QQQ +2.08%, SPY +1.39%, IWM +1.50%, DIA +1.24%. Large > small by 0.58pp. Oil -7.09% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated vol in RSP 1.2x, SLV 1.1x; SPY vol_ratio implicit in 0.97x indices avg, QQQ 0.9x losing attn. XLU 1.4x, XLV 1.3x, XLE 1.3x gaining despite XLE -4.12% signaling distribution. Vol down + price up in QQQ/IWM shows low-conviction rally.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +2.66%, XLI Industrials +2.59%, XLB Materials +1.71%, XLY Discretionary +1.52%, XLC Comms +1.49%, XLRE Real Estate +1.29%, XLF Financials +0.48%, XLP Staples +0.21%, XLV Healthcare +0.07%, XLU Utilities -1.42%, XLE Energy -4.12%. Top industries WGMI +10.19%, SILJ +8.91%; bottom XOP -6.24%, USO -7.09%.

THE 7s — Fab 7 +5.93% (NVDA strongest, TSLA weakest), New Metals 7 +5.68% (SLV strongest, PAAS weakest), Old Metals 7 +5.29% (GDX strongest, PAAS weakest), Semi 7 +5.24% (AMD strongest, INTC weakest), Industrial 7 +4.04% (HON strongest, CAT weakest). Energy 7 -4.47% (SLB strongest, FANG weakest), Software 7 -2.50% (ANET strongest, ADBE weakest), Power 7 -1.37% (NEE strongest, CEG weakest), Insurance 7 -0.71% (CB strongest, ALL weakest), Toll Road 7 -0.43% (FOUR strongest, CIEN weakest).

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Stance: Hawk 6 (Cook et al), Neutral 5 (Powell et al), Dove 4 (Bowman et al). USD liquidity 35/100 normal, Reserve Scarcity 85th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.04, QQQ 1.13 elevated signaling protection; SPY skew +4.9% put premium. SPY spot 7365 above GEX flip 728. VIX 17.4 below 18.3 MA shows complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -7.09% on US-Iran peace lifting XLI +2.59% industrials. SLV +6.40%, GLD +3.03% diverging from risk-on into safe-haven.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 54.1 neutral. Top movers SLV +6.40% metals, WGMI +10.19% industries, Fab 7 +5.93% baskets. 20d momentum: XLK +20.00% best sector, Fab 7 +19.18% best basket; XLV -2.85% worst sector, Defense 7 -12.00% worst basket. Vol spikes RSPD 5.7x +2.04% accumulation.

WATCH — ANET -13.61% vol 4.5x distribution near Buildout 7. RSPD +2.04% 5.7x vol spike EW discretionary. XHB +2.86% 2.6x vol industrials momentum break.
